error.title: Something went wrong
error.message: We could not load the data. Please try again.

error.catalogueMessage: We couldn't load the sale catalogue. Please try again.
error.vehicleMessage: We couldn't load the vehicle details. Please try again.

empty.title: No results found
empty.message: Try adjusting your filters to find what you are looking for.
empty.salesMessage: No sales match your current filters. Try adjusting your selection.
empty.vehiclesMessage: This sale has no vehicle lots listed yet. Check back closer to the sale date.
